title: Uniface Reserved Words
text: Uniface Reserved Words Reserved words are terms that cannot be used to name your Rocket® Uniface objects. The following words are reserved when naming any Uniface object: Names of Repository entities. Names of tables or files associated with Repository entities. Names of overflow tables or files associated with Repository entities. For more information about repository entities and all tables and files associated with them, see Meta Dictionary . Names of ProcScript statements, see ProcScript: Statements for details. Names of ProcScript functions, see ProcScript: Functions for details. Names of ProcScript datatypes, see Uniface Data Types for details. Names of ProcScript Precompiler Directives and Uniface Constants, see ProcScript: Precompiler Directives and Uniface Constants for details. Anything considered by your DBMSs, networks, and operating systems to be a reserved word. For details, and to validate syntax of names, see the appropriate documentation for your systems. Additionally, the following list of reserved words for naming specific repository objects: Table 1.
